C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sender.dir/objects.a
C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\mingw-w64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sender.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sender.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\mingw-w64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sender.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o sender.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsender.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sender.dir\linkLibs.rsp
